channel.title: Holiday Park CCTV on The Security Gazette
channel.description: Recent content in Holiday Park CCTV on The Security Gazette

item.title: CCTV for Holiday Parks and Campsites — Seasonal Security UK 2026
item.description: How to implement effective CCTV for holiday parks, caravan sites, and campsites: entrance control, seasonal considerations, static caravan security, and guest privacy protection.
